CustomField.description: True when the agency is asserting a statutory NEPA waiver (e.g., IIRIRA Section 102(c), EPAct Section 390). Triggers VR-003 validation rule: blocks save without an attached OGC legal sufficiency memo and valid funding authority citation per 42 USC 4332(2)(C).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check only when a statutory NEPA waiver applies. Requires OGC legal sufficiency memo before project can advance.
CustomField.label: NEPA Waiver Invoked
